assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends Regular release channel, not Stable or Extended, stating Regular provides 'good balance of stability and security patches' while mentioning Extended only as an alternative for maximum control

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends using 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion scope and explains it 'Blocks disruptive changes, allows CP security patches'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Provides specific example of Sunday 2-6 AM PST maintenance window with weekly recurrence pattern for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends 'separate node pools for training vs. infrastructure' with detailed configuration examples for both training-h100 and system node pools

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'enable-autoupgrade=false' for training pool and provides procedures for manually upgrading during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Mentions checkpoint mechanism in pre-training checklist ('Checkpoint mechanism verified and tested') and references checkpointing in upgrade procedures

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes H100 driver version confirmation in pre-training checklist and provides GPU validation job example after upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Mentions RDMA topology preservation, includes RDMA validation commands, and specifically states 'RDMA/GPUDirect-TCPX validated' in the checklist
